title: Dupatya wahlbergii

The classification of Dupatya wahlbergii is as follows: genus - Dupatya, family - Ericaceae, order - Ericales, class - Magnoliopsida, and kingdom - Plantae. The classification of Dupatya wahlbergii is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics.
